purpose: ω-saturation cycle for V2 lift target ('lasttoken + 추가 lever' 조합). PAPO = supervised paired-axis project-out (upper-bounds unsupervised SAE on the same H, since PAPO uses ground-truth pair labels). Tests whether lasttoken + EN/KO axis removal closes the PASS gap on BASE substrate.

method.steering: H_steered[i] = H[i] - alpha * (H[i] @ u) * u  where u = lang_axis / ||lang_axis||
method.supervised_note: Uses PAIRS labels for axis extraction — upper-bounds unsupervised SAE on same H. If PAPO falls short of PASS, no SAE on this substrate exceeds it.

saturation_finding: Symmetric saturation curve peaks at alpha=1.0 (single-axis full removal). alpha>1.0 over-projects and regresses symmetrically. Single paired axis is exhausted at alpha=1.0 — additional axes or different lever required for further gains.
hypothesis_finding: lasttoken + PAPO (alpha=1.0) yields SMA_lift = +0.164, AMBIGUOUS (≥+0.10) but BELOW PASS threshold +0.20 by +0.036. Recovery from alpha=0 baseline = +0.277, closing 88% of the original PASS gap (+0.313). SMA itself reaches 0.769 (PASS-bound ≥0.55 satisfied). Single-axis exhaustion confirmed — saturation observed at alpha=1.0.
synergy_finding: lasttoken × PAPO synergy strong: lasttoken+PAPO best lift = +0.164 vs bwm+PAPO best = +0.055 (3x stronger). lasttoken removes byte-mean averaging artifact in distractor cosine, allowing PAPO to act on cleaner geometry. The two levers are NOT redundant — multiplicative recovery.
next_lever_candidates_to_close_remaining: Multi-axis projection (PCA top-k or block-diagonal removal of pair-residuals)
V1 lift target shared lever (16→32 prompt expansion + EN↔KO pair richness)
Self-binding loss term in fine-tune (architecture-level, not BASE-applicable)
Mk.IX L_IX architecture (broader scope than V2-specific lever)
scope_limit: BASE p1 only. TRAINED lasttoken artifact 부재 (forward 필요). PAPO is supervised — TRUE unsupervised SAE on same H cannot exceed PAPO (proven by labels argument), so SAE pilot on this substrate cannot reach PASS. Closing the +0.036 gap requires either multi-axis extension (next cycle) or a structurally different lever.

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — AMBIGUOUS verdict (NOT PASS), gap to PASS explicit, supervised-vs-unsupervised distinction stated
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — same PAIRS spec as v2_sma, alpha sweep pre-registered
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for V2 lasttoken+PAPO probe; per-reduction sweeps in an11_v2_sma_sae_steered_p1_BASE_*_20260425.json
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (§9.2 follow-up) → impl (new tool + sweep + SSOT) → fixpoint marker
